body_excerpt: In ProtocolSimBuilderLegacy::BuildSimGetGbaAuth of protocolsimbuilderlegacy.cpp, there is a possible out of bounds read due to a missing bounds check. This could lead to local information disclosure with System execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足
